docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $668.32 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT 1401 GOUGH HOMEOWNER'S ASSN. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 1401 GOUGH HOMEOWNER'S ASSN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1401 GOUGH HOMEOWNER'S ASSN. $668.32 PRINCIPAL, $16.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $684.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO 1401 GOUGH HOMEOWNERS ASSN. RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
